title: LUSTER - Shinier Tools
body:
This pack started off as an attempt to remake some of Minecraft's older textures to fit a bit better with the modern artstyle. It's become a bit more of its own thing now, but the overall goal is still pretty much the same.

Some of the key features are more consistent material palettes, shinier tools (duh), and Wooden and Stone tools being smaller to emphasize their weakness.

![Most current retextures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e7e00bf71ebf79c6eedc85b0ebe09395ab3f12d.png)

I claim no ownership of these sprite edits or the original sprites that they were based on, but I do ask that I'm credited for my contributions if anyone modifies them.
